texto: But I promise you, you guys can do it. In four days you'll be the happiest person Earth has ever seen. You'll stand by the ocean and feel the salty sea spray tingling in your nose. You'll be with people you know and love, and you'all appreciate how beautiful everything is. You'll se cars behind you in your rear view mirror, and maybe you'll laugh at the driver's faces. Because they'll look annoyed, bored, angry. And you'll realize what they're missing. You'll live a long and happy life, Mia. Because when you get home, you'll realize that anything is possible. You mustn't ever forget that.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Johan Harstad sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “But I promise you, you guys can do it. In four days you'll be the happiest person Earth has ever …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, esperanca, inspiracional, útil em momentos de inspiracao e inspiracional.

You'll be with people you know and love, and you'all appreciate how beautiful everything is. You'll se cars behind you in your rear view mirror, and maybe you'll laugh at the driver's faces. Because they'll look annoyed, bored, angry. And you'll realize what they're missing. You'll live a long and happy life, Mia. Because when you get home, you'll realize that anything is possible. texto: God isn't here. God doesn't even know about this place
explicacao: Citação de Johan Harstad sobre temas ligados a fe. “God isn't here. God doesn't even know about this place” articula fe, horror, isolation em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como isolation e reflection.
